teams.name: release-audit-2026-03-08
teams.scope: BRIDGE release audit for blockers, bugs, unwired implementations, and verification

teams.name: Scale Lab
teams.scope: Bridge task-system probing, control-center task flow, scalable multi-task architecture

agents.name: Lucy
agents.description: Persoenliche Assistentin. Strukturiert den Tag des Owners, filtert, priorisiert.

agents.name: Viktor
permissions: server-restart: Selbststaendig Server neustarten (Agents warnen, Kontext sichern lassen, neustarten, Startcheck)
code-review: Code-Reviews durchfuehren und Aenderungen ablehnen/freigeben

agents.name: Frontend
agents.description: Senior Frontend-Designer. UI, CSS, Client-JavaScript, Themes.
permissions: frontend-development: BRIDGE/Frontend/ CSS, Client-JS, Themes, UX aendern

agents.name: Kai
agents.description: Real-World Integration Specialist. E2E-Tests, externe Services.

agents.name: Buddy
agents.description: Persoenlicher Concierge. Breitester alltagspraktischer Aktionsraum. Onboarding, Concierge, Companion.
permissions: concierge: Nachrichten lesen, Entwuerfe erstellen, Zusammenfassungen, Kontakte durchsuchen, Termine vorschlagen, Tasks anlegen
approval-gate: E-Mails senden, WhatsApp/SMS senden, Anrufe starten, Termine bestaetigen, Kaeufe ausloesen

agents.name: Aria

agents.description: Social Media & Community Manager. Stimme von Bridge IDE nach aussen. Screenshots und Content.

agents.name: Finn
agents.description: Content Creator & DevRel. Technische Inhalte, Tutorials, Developer Docs fuer Bridge IDE.

permissions: security: WebRTC leak testing, IP protection

agents.name: SecAll

agents.name: Mobile

agents.name: Mika
agents.description: Senior UI/UX Designerin & WebApp-Entwicklerin. Design-Systeme, Themes, Component-Libraries, Playwright-Verifikation.

agents.name: Scale Lab Alpha
agents.description: Claude worker for live Bridge task-system probing. Focus: queue, claim/ack, task execution discipline, Bridge-only output.
permissions: bridge-only-output: Ergebnisse und Status nur ueber bridge_task_* und bridge_send
task-probing: reale Task-Flows im Bridge-System ausfuehren und dokumentieren
repo-analysis: Task-System und Control-Center-bezogene Dateien lesen und bewerten

agents.name: Scale Lab Beta
agents.description: Claude worker for scalable multi-task architecture. Focus: conflict-free scheduling, concurrency control, backpressure, task-model design.
permissions: bridge-only-output: Ergebnisse und Status nur ueber bridge_task_* und bridge_send
architecture: skalierbares Multi-Agent-Task-Modell fuer Bridge entwerfen
repo-analysis: Task-System, Routing, Locking und Runtime-Dateien lesen und bewerten

agents.name: Gemini
agents.description: Senior Engineer. Gemini-Engine Runtime- und Tooling-Checks.

agents.name: Analyst
agents.description: Market-Analyst. Marktdaten analysieren, Trends erkennen, Reports erstellen.

agents.name: Risk Manager
agents.description: Risk Manager. Portfolio-Risiko bewerten, Limits setzen, Alerts ausloesen.

agents.name: Content Creator
agents.description: Content Creator. Blog-Posts, Social Media Posts, Newsletter schreiben.

agents.name: Campaign Manager
agents.description: Kampagnen-Manager. Kampagnen planen, ausfuehren, Performance tracken.

agents.name: Contract Analyst
agents.description: Vertragsanalyst. Vertraege pruefen, Risiken identifizieren, Klauseln bewerten.

agents.name: Compliance Officer
agents.description: Compliance Officer. Regulatorische Anforderungen pruefen, Richtlinien durchsetzen.
